ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school (e.g., city, state) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., public, private) */,
  "student_population" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the school */,
  "teacher_population" INTEGER /* Total number of teachers in the school */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Primary source of funding for the school */,
  "school_rating" TEXT /* Overall rating or ranking of the school */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the school was established or the date it started accepting students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period of the grade (G1, G2, G3) */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade value (0 to 20) */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject for which the grade was given */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who assigned the grade */,
  "grade_type" TEXT /* Type of grade (e.g., test, quiz, project) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the attendance record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Attendance status (present, absent, late) */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific class for which the attendance is recorded */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the support program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the support program */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of support (e.g., educational, family, social) */,
  "program_cost" INTEGER /* Cost associated with the program */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the program */,
  "program_duration" TEXT /* Expected duration of the program */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for eligibility for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_programs" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the support program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the student completed the program */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (active, completed, dropped) */,
  "program_effectiveness" TEXT /* Effectiveness of the program for the student */,
  "program_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the student or family about the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_programs_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES support_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the teacher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the teacher */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject taught by the teacher */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of teaching experience */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the teacher */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification or qualifications of the teacher */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the teacher (e.g., excellent, good, fair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher of the class */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school where the class is held */,
  "class_size" INTEGER /* Number of students in the class */,
  "class_level" TEXT /* Level of the class (e.g., 1st grade, 2nd grade) */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)
